It is generated by CoffeeScript, which is common for transpiled code. There are no dynamic behaviors, no obfuscation, no network calls, and no data processing.\n\n---\n\n### Review of each report:\n\n**General observations:**\n- All reports agree that the code is a simple, generated module export.\n- No suspicious behaviors, obfuscation, or malicious code are identified.\n- No untrusted data sources or sinks are present.\n- The purpose across reports is consistent: exporting a HashMap module for external use.\n\n**Specific points:**\n- **Malware score:** All reports assign `malware: 0`.
